arts.ttl: Matty Cash opens up on 'annoying' injury and sets himself Aston Villa target
arts.sum: Matty Cash is ready to kick-start his season after overcoming a hamstring injury as Aston Villa look to return to winning ways in the Premier League against Fulham at Craven Cottage on Saturday. "We go to Fulham wanting to win," Cash said via the club website .

arts.ttl: The two qualities which set Morgan Rogers apart as rapid Aston Villa rise continues
arts.sum: Rogers signed for Manchester City in 2019 and spent time out on loan at three clubs, starting with Lincoln in January 2021. After spells at Bournemouth and Blackpool, the former West Brom youngster headed to Middlesbrough permanently before signing for Villa just six months into his contract at the Riverside Stadium.

arts.ttl: Huge financial issue set to derail Aston Villa’s season
arts.sum: Under Unai Emery, Aston Villa’s star has continued to ascend, though a big problem with Financial Fair Play could end up derailing their season. The Spaniard has a ‘secret’ to get the best out of his players and, so far in 2024/25, it appears to be working. The Villains currently find themselves in fifth position […] The post Huge financial issue set to derail Aston Villa’s season appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday eight this weekend and James Mason has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top-flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: John McGinn jokes about being a 'fat Youtuber' as Aston Villa skipper answers question as only he can

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes big Jhon Duran decision as pundits share same Fulham v Aston Villa verdict
arts.sum: Moving onto them, Merson makes the difficult choice to start Ollie Watkins ahead of Jhon Duran, which ultimately makes sense as the Colombian has travelled approximately 13,000 air miles in the past week . "I still think Jhon Duran should be on the bench and not start ahead of Ollie Watkins," he explained.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side looking to set new club record
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be looking to set a new club record when they square off against Fulham in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery favourite 'crazy' about transfer after renewed Aston Villa interest
arts.sum: Days after Aston Villa were said to have renewed their interested, reported transfer target Alex Baena is claimed to have decided he will only depart Villarreal for Barcelona.
